meta_title: For Founders: user onboarding to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: User Onboarding to Solve Project Stagnation
content.seo_description: Stop abandoning projects. Learn how to implement high-converting user onboarding using Antigravity and Claude Code to drive MVP retention and revenue.
content.answer_block: Project stagnation stems from a lack of user activation. By implementing a frictionless, value-first onboarding flow, you bridge the gap between signup and the 'Aha!' moment. Use Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative refinement to transform your MVP into a high-retention, revenue-generating SaaS product.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS is littered with projects that never reached product-market fit simply because the founder couldn't get users past the registration screen. You’ve spent weeks perfecting the backend, but your users are churning in seconds because they don't understand the value proposition. The difference between a side project and a business is how quickly you can guide a stranger to their first win.

This isn't about adding 'tours' or 'tooltips' that everyone ignores. It’s about engineering a high-velocity user journey that minimizes friction and maximizes activation. We are going to leverage Antigravity for architectural speed and Claude Code for surgical precision to build an onboarding flow that actually converts.

steps.title: Architecting the Value-First Flow
steps.description: Define the shortest path from 'Sign Up' to 'First Successful Action'. We prioritize data collection via progressive profiling rather than long forms.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a minimal user onboarding workflow schema that captures core user intent in three steps, prioritizing immediate access to the main dashboard without requiring email verification until the first action is completed.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Generate the React components for a 3-step progressive onboarding wizard with Framer Motion transitions.'

steps.title: Implementing Contextual Data Hooks
steps.description: Hook into the user's input to personalize the interface immediately. This creates a psychological sense of ownership.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a state management hook for user preferences that triggers dynamic UI changes based on the persona selected during the onboarding flow.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file src/hooks/useOnboarding.ts --instruction 'Implement a state-based personalization engine that updates the dashboard view based on user input.'

steps.title: Automated Trigger-Based Emails
steps.description: If the user drops off, the system should automatically nudge them back into the loop using specific triggers.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a backend service logic that monitors user progress in the onboarding flow and triggers an automated email sequence if the user exits before step 3.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Connect the onboarding state to a Resend API service to trigger follow-up emails on drop-off.'

steps.title: Gamifying the Activation Milestone
steps.description: Reward the user for completing their profile or performing their first core task to build positive reinforcement.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a confetti-based success animation component that triggers upon the completion of the final onboarding step.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file src/components/OnboardingSuccess.tsx --instruction 'Add a confetti animation library and trigger it on successful completion of the final step.'

steps.title: A/B Testing the Onboarding Funnel
steps.description: Use analytics to identify where users are dropping off and iterate on the copy or UI components.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Setup a simple A/B testing wrapper for the onboarding components to track conversion rates per step.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Integrate PostHog analytics into the onboarding flow to track step-by-step conversion metrics.'

pro_tips: Never ask for a credit card until the user has experienced at least one successful outcome.
Use 'Progressive Profiling': ask for one piece of data at a time to keep cognitive load low.
The 'Aha!' moment should happen in under 60 seconds; if it takes longer, cut features until it does.
Implement a 'Skip' button for every onboarding step to avoid trapping power users.
Use session replay tools like LogRocket or FullStory to watch where users actually get stuck, not where you think they get stuck.
content.next_steps: Once the onboarding flow is live, monitor the drop-off rates for 48 hours. Use the data to refine your copy and simplify the most difficult step. Then, move on to building your first upsell feature.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your projects die in the draft folder. You have the tools to build, the strategy to convert, and the community to support your growth. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
